Notice Of Motion And Motion, As Prevailing Party, To Recover Attorney'S Fees From Pltf Scott Robertson
Off Calendar Oct-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DOUGLAS MCNIE DBA MCGREGOR COMMUNICATIONS' Motion, As The Prevailing Party, To Recover Attorneys' Fees From Plaintiff Scott Robertson.
APPEARANCES: Steven Yuen, Esq. of Murphy, Pearson, Bradley & Feeney 788-1900 for deft & moving party (indicated to the Court that he complied with the tentative ruling rule and gave proper notice); no other appearances.
RULING: Argued and the Court vacated its tentative ruling and granted the motion. Defendant is prevailing party and entitled to reasonable attorneys fees in the amount of $15,944.00. Order signed in open court. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
